sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (event DateTime64(3), description String);
INSERT INTO test_dates VALUES (toDateTime('2024-01-01 00:00:00'), 'New Year Event');
UPDATE test_dates SET event = subtractMilliseconds(event, 5000) WHERE description = 'New Year Event';
SELECT description, subtractMilliseconds(event, 10000) AS updated_event FROM test_dates;
